response: The Department of Energy has made significant strides in renewable energy research through its routine efforts to develop more efficient solar panels - the routine includes funding for advanced photovoltaic materials - the routine also supports wind energy innovations by improving turbine designs - the routine focuses on energy storage solutions to address intermittency issues - the routine includes research into next-generation battery technologies - the routine promotes grid modernization to integrate renewable sources more effectively - the routine encourages collaboration between government agencies and private sector partners - the routine aims to reduce the cost of renewable energy technologies - the routine supports the development of hydrogen as a clean energy carrier - the routine includes initiatives to enhance the reliability and resilience of energy systems
